flagged_claims.claim: We believe that longterm business success is inseparable from environmental stewardship and social responsibility.
This report presents verified data, strategic targets, and key performance indicators across our three ESG pillars.
Environmental Performance Our environmental strategy focuses on emissions reduction, renewable energy adoption, water stewardship, and waste minimization across all operational facilities.
Social Responsibility Verdanta is committed to fair labor practices, community development, and workplace safety.
Governance  Transparency Strong governance is central to our ESG strategy.
We maintain a dedicated ESG Board Committee that oversees all sustainability disclosures and policy commitments.
